types.notes: Contains search criteria like origin, destination, date
Contains search results including itineraries and status
Represents a flight itinerary with legs and pricing details
Represents a single flight with origin, destination, time
Contains collection of flights for a search

ownership.rationale: Return result instead of modifying by reference
Abstract over different data loading implementations

functions.name: MP_Search
post: SearchResults contains valid data or error
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights

functions.name: buildItineraries
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of flights

functions.name: priceItineraries
functions.complexity: O(n) where n is number of itineraries

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "SearchRequest"
    rust: "struct SearchRequest"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Contains search criteria like origin, destination, date"

  - cpp: "SearchResults"
    rust: "struct SearchResults"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Contains search results including itineraries and status"

  - cpp: "Itinerary"
    rust: "struct Itinerary"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Represents a flight itinerary with legs and pricing details"

  - cpp: "Flight"
    rust: "struct Flight"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Represents a single flight with origin, destination, time"

  - cpp: "LogicalEntity"
    rust: "struct LogicalEntity"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Contains collection of flights for a search"

  - cpp: "CacheKey"
    rust: "struct CacheKey"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Unique identifier for cache entries"

  - cpp: "CacheManager"
    rust: "struct CacheManager"
    ownership: "Arc<CacheManager>"
    notes: "Singleton cache implementation"

  - cpp: "Timer"
    rust: "struct Timer"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Measures elapsed time"

  - cpp: "SearchStatus"
    rust: "enum SearchStatus"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Enumeration of possible search outcomes"

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "Static variables (searchCount_, cacheHitCount_, etc)"
    rust_pattern: "Arc<Mutex<Statistics>>"
    rationale: "Thread-safe access to shared counters"

  - cpp_pattern: "References to SearchResults"
    rust_pattern: "Result<SearchStatus, Error>"
    rationale: "Return result instead of modifying by reference"

  - cpp_pattern: "DataLoader and YamlDataLoader"
    rust_pattern: "Box<dyn DataLoader>"
    rationale: "Abstract over different data loading implementations"

error_paths:
  - source: "std::exception"
    recovery: "Return Result with error"
    rust: "Result<SearchStatus, Error>"

  - source: "PricingException"
    recovery: "Return Result with error"
    rust: "Result<SearchStatus, Error>"

functions:
  - name: "MP_Search"
    pre: ["SearchRequest must be valid"]
    post: ["SearchResults contains valid data or error"]
    side_effects: ["Increments searchCount_", "Updates cache statistics"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights"

  - name: "buildItineraries"
    pre: ["LogicalEntity contains valid flights"]
    post: ["Returns valid list of Itineraries"]
    side_effects: ["Logs debug information"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of flights"

  - name: "priceItineraries"
    pre: ["Valid Itinerary list"]
    post: ["Itineraries contain pricing information"]
    side_effects: ["Logs debug/error information"]
    complexity: "O(n) where n is number of itineraries"

  - name: "sortByPrice"
    pre: ["Valid Itinerary list"]
    post: ["Itineraries sorted by price"]
    side_effects: ["Logs debug information"]
    complexity: "O(n log n)"

  - name: "limitResults"
    pre: ["Valid Itinerary list"]
    post: ["Itinerary list limited to maxItineraries_"]
    side_effects: ["Logs debug information"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

invariants:
  - "maxItineraries_ must be > 0"
  - "cacheHitCount_ + cacheMissCount_ == searchCount_"

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "Functions are not thread-safe"
  shared_state: ["searchCount_", "cacheHitCount_", "cacheMissCount_"]

dependencies:
  - "yaml-cpp (for YamlDataLoader)"
  - "boost (for Timer)"
